chinese_news.title: 林俊旸创业，新公司估值约20亿美金丨智能涌现独家
chinese_news.summary:
文｜周鑫雨 邓咏仪

编辑｜杨轩

林俊旸以创业者的身份，重新加入AI模型的战场。

《智能涌现》独家获悉，前阿里千问大模型技术负责人林俊旸近期已经开启创业，考虑方向包括世界模型和具身大脑。

目前，林俊旸已经招募数名字节、腾讯和海外背景的成员，并以约20亿美金的估值开启融资，接触基金包括红杉中国、高榕创投等。

截至发稿前，有关上述信息，林俊旸尚未回复。

时间距离3月初的那场“闪电”诀别，已经过去了两个月。

2026年3月4日凌晨，林俊旸在X上宣布离开千问：“me stepping down. bye my beloved qwen（我卸任了。再见了，我深爱的千问）。”更早前，3月3日下午，他在Qwen成员的钉钉群中发出消息：“无颜再带领大家。”

在从百模大战，快速收束至巨头争锋（字节、阿里、DeepSeek）的三年里，林俊旸是阿里Qwen留在大

chinese_news.title: 6月上海，这场论坛聊透出海真问题
chinese_news.summary:
副标题：韧性全球化，AI向未来｜EqualOcean2026出海全球化百人论坛（GGF2026）将于6月11日在上海举行

出海这件事，已经变了。

如果今天还把出海理解为“寻找增量市场”，大概率已经慢了一步。

 如今，中国企业出海已经进入一个全新的阶段。真正拉开差距的，早已不是“是否出海”，而是：

· 下一阶段最值得重仓的区域市场在哪里？

· AI应该优先进入哪些关键环节，才能形成真正差异化？

chinese_news.title: 36氪专访 | 安克创新eufy Make负责人：众筹超4000万美金后，还在红海寻找缝隙
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 张子怡

编辑 | 袁斯来

那是一个价值5000万美元成功故事诞生的夜晚。

eufy Make的产研负责人Cheney Xie仍然记得狂喜带来的多巴胺。那是2025年4月29日晚上十点，eufy MakeUV打印机E1上线众筹。

首个100万美元的记录用时不过一分钟。“感觉像爆金币一样，金额哗啦啦涨上去。”

当夜无人入眠。直到凌晨四五点，组内的同学还在不停更新着众筹金额的实时截图。

时至今日，eufy Make E1仍以4670万美元的众筹金额，维持着Kickstarter历史上融资额最高的项目记录。

eufy Make E1走过了近一年，产品在海外已接近完全交付。eufy Make E1在国内市场也正式开启售卖。

无论是对安克创新，还是对eufy Make，成功量产且交付都颇具里程碑意味。毕竟，E1是全球首款消费级UV打印机，生产它需要全新的经验，也要面临

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 清华系光计算芯片企业完成数千万天使轮融资，瞄准全波光计算架构
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，近日，光子芯力（北京）科技有限公司（以下简称“光子芯力”）宣布完成数千万元天使轮融资，由苏州芯阳基金、驰星创投、盛景嘉成联合领投，开源创投跟投。

光子芯力成立于2024年，总部位于北京，是一家专注于光电融合计算芯片的硬科技初创公司。公司创始人杨其晟博士毕业于清华大学集成电路学院，具备光电融合交叉背景，核心团队亦主要来自清华大学，成员覆盖光学、算法、半导体及产业资源等方向。

当前，光计算正被视为突破电子芯片“功耗墙”“存储墙”的重要方向之一，行业也逐渐进入产业化前夜。光子芯力的核心产品聚焦于光电异构计算芯片及配套软件工具链。

硬件层面，光子芯力创新性地采用了“全波计算”技术路线。杨其晟介绍，目前光计算领域的技术路径尚未完全收敛，公司选择基于“全波超表面”的差异化路线，目标是最大化释放光计算的性能潜力。

不同于传统将集成光学元

chinese_news.title: 深耕“具身智能+建筑大模型”底座，重构万亿建筑业，「方石机器人」完成近亿元A轮融资 | 36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
36氪获悉，智能建造机器人本体开发商北京方石机器人有限公司（下称「方石机器人」）近期宣布完成近亿元A轮融资，由北京科创亦庄直投基金、航发基金等机构联合投资。资金将主要用于核心产品的研发迭代投入、批量化生产交付能力建设以及海外市场体系布局。

方石机器人产品矩阵

方石机器人成立于2019年，致力于解决建筑行业用工老龄化、作业环境高危低效等痛点，通过打造全栈自研的“具身智能+建筑大模型”AI解决方案，推动传统建筑业向智能建造模式转型。目前，公司已深度

京东：第一季度营收3157亿元，同比增长4.9%

36氪获悉，京东发布2026年第一季度财报，第一季度营收3157亿元，同比增长4.9%；非美国通用会计准则下（Non-GAAP）归母净利润74亿元；京东零售经营利润率提升至5.6%，经营利润创历史新高。截至一季度，京东年度活跃用户数超7.4亿，季度活跃用户数实现连续10个季度的同比双位数增长。京东体系研发投入在一季度同比增长59%。

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Arthur Hayes publicly forecast BTC to $126K on Iran war and AI capex thesis; Bitcoin just broke $81K and markets pricing geopolitical tail risk.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (Hayes forecast), CoinDesk (BTC $81K milestone), Iran war escalation (CNBC inflation story)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates below 3.5% by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Kevin Warsh confirmed to Fed board; inflation reaccelerating (Iran, energy, groceries per CNBC); Powell-era rate path now contested; market pricing divergence.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Warsh confirmation), CNBC (April 2026 inflation data showing price pressures)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Keir Starmer remain UK Prime Minister through July 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Starmer under intense pressure; Jamie Dimon warns JP Morgan may reconsider London office if he's ousted; gilt market repriced Wednesday on survival signal; binary political risk.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Dimon quote, Starmer EU pivot, bond market stress), BBC (Starmer defying quit calls)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum's Clear Signing standard be adopted by >50% of major wallets by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Ethereum Foundation just unveiled Clear Signing to combat blind-signing exploits; security UX is now market-competitive; adoption momentum measurable via on-chain data.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Clear Signing launch), Cointelegraph (blind signing security narrative)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Jensen Huang's China trip result in NVIDIA securing new U.S.–China semiconductor deal by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Huang personally invited by Trump to China trip; geopolitical opening narrowing; chip export restrictions core to US–China tensions; deal signal high-value.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Huang joins Trump China trip, explicit mention of call from Trump)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will OpenAI's valuation exceed $200 billion by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Secondary market trades (Forge, EquityZen, Carta), Series funding announcements, or official OpenAI statement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SoftBank just booked $46B gain on OpenAI stake; public enthusiasm for valuation climb vastly exceeds prediction market pricing; no major market yet at scale on OpenAI-specific valuations.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SoftBank earnings report showing OpenAI unrealized gains at new highs

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Strait of Hormuz remain open (no major blockade event) through December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Reuters/Bloomberg shipping data, US maritime authority (NAVCENT), Iranian IRGC statements, oil tanker insurance premiums
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Iran war narrative is live; Trump–Xi summit imminent with explicit goal to 'reopen Strait'; geopolitical prediction markets underweight US–China cooperation on regional stability.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC headline: 'Beijing and Washington will likely reaffirm their shared intention to reopen the Strait of Hormuz'

market_questions_to_create.question: Will JPMorgan's tokenized fund (newly filed) attract >$500 million in AUM by August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: JPMorgan investor relations, SEC Form N-PX filings, third-party fund tracker (Morningstar, eSpeed)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Wall Street tokenization race overheated; JPMorgan's brand guarantees traction; no prediction market yet priced on specific tokenized fund adoption metrics.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: 'JPMorgan files to launch new tokenized fund as Wall Street tokenization race heats up'

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Kalshi secure a permanent exemption from Ohio's prediction market ban by March 31, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Ohio appeals court ruling, CFTC final order, Kalshi press release or SEC filing
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CFTC just backed Kalshi in appeals court; regulatory tailwind real; prediction market legitimacy thesis underpriced relative to stakes.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: 'CFTC backs prediction market Kalshi in appeals court fight against Ohio'

market_questions_to_create.question: Will stablecoin yield infrastructure (Sky Ecosystem cohort) exceed $2 billion in AUM by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: DeFi Llama, Etherscan smart contract TVL, Sky Ecosystem blog posts or investor updates
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Privacy and yield are emerging killer apps; $13.5M seed round suggests early momentum; nascent category with high growth optionality.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: 'Stablecoin yield infrastructure project raises $13.5M in round led by Sky Ecosystem'

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin rallies to $95K–$110K by end of Q3 2026 on Iran war geopolitical premium and AI capex flow-through demand, despite Fed hawkishness.
supporting_signals: BTC broke $81K on hot CPI (CNBC, CoinDesk); Hayes $126K thesis on Hayes podcast traction
Iran war heating (CNBC energy/inflation narrative); Trump–Xi summit reducing US–China tariff risk narrative
Ethereum Foundation security upgrades (Clear Signing) drive ETH/BTC ratio stability, reducing macro hedging demand for BTC dominance
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed rate cuts stall if inflation doesn't roll over by June; Warsh hardline on board could delay easing; geopolitical normalization post-summit deflates war premium.
investment_theses.expression: Long 2x leveraged BTC perpetual futures on Bybit/Deribit; or hold BTC spot with DCA on $75K dips

investment_theses.thesis: OpenAI's Series funding (or secondary market mark-up) by Q4 2026 drives venture-backed AI token and AI-focused crypto ecosystem sentiment, favoring LAB, ICP proxy plays.
supporting_signals: SoftBank $46B unrealized gain on OpenAI; valuation inertia favors mark-ups at Series or secondary
36Kr: Alibaba Qwen model lead engineer (Lin Junyang) spun out $2B valued startup; AI model founder turnover = capital velocity into AI tokens
Privacy crypto narrative (Arc, Canton, Tempo $1B+ funding per CoinDesk) suggests AI + privacy as fusion thesis
investment_theses.counter_view: OpenAI remains private; no near-term funding event; broader crypto sentiment remains sideways absent major macro catalyst.
investment_theses.expression: Overweight AI-exposed alts (LAB, ICP, or AI-adjacent L1s like Solana) in 10–15% allocation; or take long position in ICP synthetic via Perpetual on Hyperliquid (now approved US ETF)

investment_theses.thesis: UK gilt yields compress and Sterling stabilizes 1.25–1.30 USD/GBP through July 2026 if Starmer survives; invert to sell GBP if he exits.
investment_theses.horizon: 2–3 months for immediate binary, 4–6 months for carry
supporting_signals: CNBC: Jamie Dimon warns London office risk if Starmer ousted; bond market already repriced Wednesday on survival signal
BBC: Starmer defies quit calls, EU reset narrative gains credibility; gilts rally on political stability bid
Jamie Dimon tone = macro risk asset manager signal; his office decision = real money hedge fund/corporate sentiment proxy
investment_theses.counter_view: Starmer's EU pivot fails; Labour's domestic policy isolation widens; snap election called before summer; gilt curve reprices hawkish.
investment_theses.expression: Long GBP/USD spot or 3M forward (target 1.28–1.30); hedge with short-dated GBP put spreads (Jul/Aug expiry) if risk aversion spikes

investment_theses.thesis: Ethereum outperforms Bitcoin (ETH/BTC ratio rallies to 0.08–0.09) through Q3 2026 on Clear Signing adoption, security narrative, and DeFi/stablecoin yield resurgence.
supporting_signals: Ethereum Foundation Clear Signing standard just launched; wallet adoption becomes competitive moat; blind-signing exploit narrative dominates crypto Twitter
Stablecoin yield infra ($13.5M round) and Sky Ecosystem momentum = renewed ETH L1 utility (yield farming, bridge volumes)
Hyperliquid ETF $1.2M inflows (crypto-native, high churn) suggest derivatives/perp trading demand favoring Ethereum execution layer
investment_theses.counter_view: Bitcoin dominance remains stable or grows on macro risk-off; Ethereum security upgrades priced in; DeFi yield compresses on saturation.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio via spot trade (sell BTC, buy ETH) or BTC short + ETH long perps on Bybit; or direct ETH spot with 2x leverage

investment_theses.thesis: USD weakness accelerates into Q3 2026 on Fed rate-cut signal (Warsh pivot) and China–US détente narrative; DXY drops to 98–99 by August.
supporting_signals: Kevin Warsh confirmed to Fed board (dovish vs. hawkish market narrative); rate-cut bets re-price upward
Trump–Xi summit imminent; tariff escalation fears fade; Chinese exporters deprioritize Iran hedges (CNBC), suggesting risk-on sentiment shift
Iran war premium on energy subsiding if Strait stabilization narrative credible; oil prices ease, inflation moderation likely by July
investment_theses.counter_view: Inflation surprises hot (groceries, energy); Fed pauses cuts; geopolitical flare-up (Iran, Ukraine) re-prices safe-haven USD strength.
investment_theses.expression: Short DXY via inverse ETF (PSQ, UUP short) or FX forwards (long EUR/USD, GBP/USD, JPY); or long commodity currencies (AUD/USD, CAD/USD)
